# jamfschool_user_group (List Resource)

Lists user groups in Jamf School.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "jamfschool_user_group" "example" {
  provider = jamfschool
  config {
    name_prefix = "Teaching"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name_prefix` (String) Optional name prefix filter.
